home.headline: Bernardo Carvalheiro
home.subline: Full-stack developer with hands-on experience in Linux environments, system monitoring and backend architecture. Focused on building reliable and maintainable systems.

about.introText: I'm a full-stack developer with a strong interest in Linux systems, infrastructure and backend architecture. Currently gaining experience in system monitoring and operational workflows in a professional environment.

Kyndryl.achievement1: Monitoring scheduled jobs and system processes in production environment.
Kyndryl.achievement2: Observing system behavior and identifying recurring failure patterns.
Kyndryl.achievement3: Executing operational workflows and reporting system incidents.

Hipercálculo II.achievement1: Repair of computers and other electronic devices, diagnosing hardware and software issues, replacing faulty components, and ensuring proper functionality.
Hipercálculo II.achievement2: Customer assisting, instalation of Ubiquiti APs and Server Rack montage.

Catering Company.achievement1: Provided excellent customer service in a fast-paced environment, consistently. Events, Weddings.
Catering Company.achievement2: Collaborated with team members to ensure smooth operations and customer satisfaction.

Backend & Full-Stack.description: Experience building full-stack applications using modern web technologies.

Linux & Systems.description: Experience working with Linux systems and infrastructure.

Windows Server & Windows Tools.description: Knowledge of Windows Server and Windows tools.

Cybersecurity.description: Fundamentals of safety practices on system and networks.
